yesterdayStoryline.headline: Bellingham brace, Argentina survive to reach semis
yesterdayStoryline.subtitle: England edged Norway after extra time; Argentina beat Switzerland via extra-time heroics and a contentious red card

todayStoryline.headline: Tournament rest day
todayStoryline.subtitle: No fixtures today; teams recover and prepare for semi-finals on Wednesday

yesterday.scorers: Andreas Schjelderup 36' (NOR) · Jude Bellingham 45+2', Jude Bellingham 93' (ENG)

lines: England dominated possession but Norway struck on a rare counter through Schjelderup.
Bellingham's late equaliser and extra-time winner sent England into the semi-finals.

yesterday.scorers: Alexis Mac Allister 10', Julián Álvarez 112', Lautaro Martínez 120+1' (ARG) · Dan Ndoye 67' (SUI)

lines: Mac Allister's early header put Argentina ahead before Switzerland levelled through Ndoye.
Embolo's second yellow and Álvarez's extra-time strike decided the tie and Argentina progressed.

news.headline: Iran declares Strait of Hormuz closed after vessel struck
news.body: Iran said it had closed the Strait of Hormuz after a ship on an unauthorised route was struck, warning of a severe response to any retaliation. Talks with mediators and diplomatic contacts continued as regional tensions rose, Reuters reported.

footerNote: All times converted from official kickoffs
